title: December 9
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|December}}

'''December 9''' is the 343rd day (344th in leap years) of the year. There are 22 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1940s#1948|1948]] – [[Robert Blalack]] is born.
*[[1960s#1960|1960]] – [[Jeff "Swampy" Marsh]] is born.
*[[1960s#1967|1967]] – [[Bob Roth]] is born.
*[[1970]] – [[Kevin Hearne]] is born.
*[[1998]] – [[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 2|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 2]] published.
*[[2000]] – The Field Museum in Chicago holds a symposium titled "The Stories Behind ''Star Wars'' and ''Sue'': Envisioning Environments in Film and at The Field".
*[[2008]] – ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' published.
*2008 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Wild Space]]'' published.
*[[2009]] – [[The Clone Wars 11|''The Clone Wars'' 11]] published.
*[[2014]] – ''[[The Inquisitor's Trap]]'' published.
*2014 – The ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' expansion [[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Shadow of Revan|''Shadow of Revan'']] is released to the public.
*2014 – [[Star Wars Insider 154|''Star Wars Insider'' 154]] published.
*[[2015]] – [[Star Wars Annual (2015) 1|''Star Wars Annual'' (2015) 1]] published.
*2015 – "[[Legacy (episode)|Legacy]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2016]] – ''[[Entertainment Weekly's Ultimate Guide to Rogue One]]'' published.
*[[2018]] – "[[Station Theta Black (episode)|Station Theta Black]]" airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2020]] – [[Star Wars (2020) 9|''Star Wars'' (2020) 9]] published.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Onslaught]]'' Update 6.2 "Echoes of Vengeance" released.
*[[2022]] – "[[Snare (short story)|Snare]]" published
*[[2025]] – ''[[Star Wars: Young Jedi Adventures—The Training Sessions]]'' published.
*2025 – [[Star Wars Insider 235|''Star Wars Insider'' 235]] published.
